articles.description: Stocks like Bharti Airtel, LIC of India, Tata Steel, HCL Tech, ICICI Bank, IRFC, Vedanta, NLC India, Bharat Forge, Sterlite Tech and more will be in the spotlight on Thursday, June 25.

articles.title: First Tick: Top global cues to watch in today's trade
articles.description: Oil prices extended their decline on Thursday, edging closer to pre-war levels as stranded tankers exited the Strait of Hormuz following an initial accord to end the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran, easing supply concerns.

articles.title: Positive Breakout: These 9 stocks cross above their 200 DMAs
articles.description: As long as the stock is priced above the 200-day SMA on the daily timeframe, it is generally considered to be in an overall uptrend.

articles.title: Crude slips toward $70 as tankers return to Hormuz after US-Iran reach peace deal
articles.description: Crude oil prices have plummeted towards pre-war levels as tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz resumes, alleviating supply worries. Following a surge past $126, oil is now hovering around $70. Improved shipping and potential Iranian exports have eased fears of disruptions, leading to a significant price drop. Traders are now anticipating a surplus as physical crude trades at discounts.

articles.title: Chhattisgarh government cracks down on illegal mining; CM Vishnu Deo Sai orders stricter penalties, enforcement
articles.description: The most significant change relates to penalties for illegal excavation and transportation. The minimum compounding amount has now been fixed at Rs 25,000 in all cases.

articles.title: LIVE: GIFT Nifty Indicates Tepid Start; Brent Crude Nears $73 A Barrel
articles.description: The GIFT Nifty, an early indicator of Nifty 50's performance, traded at 24,114, compared to Wednesday's index close of 24,021.65.

articles.title: Markets likely to extend gains; AU Bank, Exide among stock ideas today
articles.description: Market outlook: Nifty, Bank Nifty likely to extend gains, says Jatin Gedia of Teji Mandi. The analyst recommends buy on AU Bank, Exide Industries and Ramco Cements.

articles.title: Gold extends losses on Fed tightening outlook, dollar strength
articles.description: Gold prices tumbled to a seven-month low on Thursday, nearing $3,985 per ounce, as a robust dollar and anticipation of Federal Reserve interest rate hikes weighed heavily. Traders are factoring in multiple rate increases this year, with a significant chance of a September hike. Investors are now keenly awaiting key U.S. inflation data for further monetary policy direction.

articles.title: A dividend India must not squander
articles.description: The road to Viksit Bharat runs through India’s labour market. The country’s demographic dividend (DD) offers a rare opportunity to accelerate growth and prosperity. As the working-age share of the population rises, and the share of dependents (those below 15, and over 60 or 64 years) falls, several benefits emerge for the economy.

articles.title: Is gold losing relevance? These factors will decide.
articles.description: A hawkish Fed under Kevin Warsh could end gold’s bull run. But central banks will continue to buy more gold amid concerns of currency debasement. This will provide a supportive floor to gold prices.

articles.title: Global Market: China's 'future industries' investment boom sparks valuation bubble concerns
articles.description: China is witnessing a massive surge in venture capital, pouring billions into futuristic sectors like space, quantum computing, and AI. This investment frenzy, driven by Beijing's ambition to lead in technology and reduce reliance on foreign tech, sees even revenue-less startups attracting significant funding. Investor confidence is high, with new listing rules easing domestic market access for these promising, government-backed ventures.

articles.title: Micron stock surges after Micron earnings report crushes estimates: How is AI demand driving Micron to new heights and what does it mean for the future?
articles.description: Micron's revenue has surged by over four times, reaching $41.46 billion in its fiscal third quarter, driven by the booming AI sector and a global memory crunch. The company's stock saw a significant jump as soaring demand for memory chips, essential for AI hardware and data centers, propelled exceptional financial results. Micron anticipates continued strong performance, with future revenue projections also exceeding expectations.

articles.title: Best medium to long duration funds to invest in June 2026
articles.description: Conservative investors are steered towards safer, short-term debt funds, often overlooking medium to long duration options due to their inherent interest rate sensitivity. These longer-term funds, while potentially rewarding in falling rate environments, carry significant volatility and risk when rates rise. Advisors caution that predicting interest rate movements is challenging, making timing entry and exit crucial for those with a higher risk appetite and long investment horizon.

articles.title: US Stock Market: AI chip rally reignites as Micron, Qualcomm forecasts add over $400 billion in market value
articles.description: Chip stocks surged on Wednesday, adding over $400 billion in market value, fueled by optimistic forecasts from Micron Technology and Qualcomm. Micron's strong outlook for memory chips and Qualcomm's ambitious data center growth targets reignited investor confidence in the AI trade. This positive sentiment boosted rivals and equipment suppliers, signaling a robust demand for AI-driven hardware and infrastructure.

articles.title: Bang & Olufsen’s newly refurbished Singapore flagship is rethinking how luxury audio is sold
articles.description: At its largest Culture Store in Asia Pacific, the century-old Danish brand is betting that experience, craftsmanship and longevity matter more than technical specifications.

articles.title: DJB seeks more water to begin work at four new WTPs
articles.description: The Delhi Jal Board seeks 528 cusecs of raw water to address water shortages and operationalize new treatment plants amid ongoing supply issues.

articles.title: Commerce Minister Goyal to travel to U.K. to review preparedness for rollout of trade deal
articles.description: Commerce Minister Goyal will visit the U.K. to ensure readiness for the India-U.K. trade agreement rollout on July 15.

articles.title: Work begins on new Central Vista metro line
articles.description: Total length of the Magenta Line corridor will become 88.4 km, making it the longest in the DMRC network, running from Botanical Garden to Inderlok as a fully driverless corridor once operational.

articles.title: 10-year-old mauled by stray dogs in Faridabad housing society basement
articles.description: Child Dragged To The Ground & Suffered Deep Bite Wounds, Undergoes Surgery

articles.title: Uttar Pradesh roadshow in Bengaluru nets Rs 50,000 crore in investment pledges
articles.description: Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath held a series of investor meetings in Bengaluru on Wednesday as part of a roadshow to attract investment into the state, which he says is now among India's top three investment destinations.

articles.title: SPG Director Alok Sharma gets nine-month service extension till 2027
articles.description: The Central government has extended the service of Special Protection Group (SPG) Director Alok Sharma by nine months. The 1991-batch IPS officer will now serve until March 31, 2027. The ACC approved the extension beyond his scheduled retirement.

articles.description: US airline stocks gain between 3% and 7% as falling crude prices eased concerns over rising operating costs for carriers.

articles.title: UP sets record in rooftop solar set-ups
articles.description: Uttar Pradesh added 50,000+ solar rooftop connections monthly (Mar–May 2026) under PM Suryaghar Yojana; CS reviews wetlands, Annapurna Bhawan, PNG, anganwadi hiring.

articles.title: Labourer tries to save friend, slips into pond, both drown in Gurgaon
articles.description: Two labourers drowned in a Gurgaon pond after one slipped while bathing and the other tried to rescue him; SDRF recovered both bodies, probe ongoing.

articles.title: In the age of AI, telecom vendors say no device can be declared vulnerability-free
articles.description: Telecom equipment manufacturers are struggling with the government's demand for guaranteed vulnerability-free gear, citing the rapid evolution of cyber threats. Vendors met with the Department of Telecommunications seeking clearer policy guidelines for Pro Tem certificates, essential for selling products like 5G equipment. The government assured that National Centre for Communication Security is finalizing new policy guidelines soon, addressing industry concerns about self-declarations and potential penalties.

articles.title: Ashish Sood orders comprehensive inspection of coaching hubs in Delhi
articles.description: Delhi Home Minister Ashish Sood on Wednesday ordered a multi-agency inspection campaign of coaching hubs across the city, including Mukherjee Nagar, Rajinder Nagar and Katwaria Sarai, to verify compliance with safety norms, building regulations and other mandatory safety requirements.

articles.title: Airlines turn to AI to save fuel; IndiGo to start trials for thriftier take-offs from today
articles.description: India Business News: NEW DELHI: After doing everything humanely possible to cut fuel burn, Indian airlines have turned to artificial intelligence (AI) to help save the pro.

articles.title: UP emerged as revenue surplus state overcoming 'Bimaru' status, says CM Adityanath
articles.description: "For the last six years, Uttar Pradesh has been a revenue-surplus state. Rising from the bottom three, Uttar Pradesh is now counted among India's top three economies," CM said.

articles.title: Tiruchi Corporation speeds up stalled UGD works in Phase II and III areas
articles.description: Tiruchi Corporation accelerates stalled underground drainage works in Phase II and III, aiming for project completion by August.

articles.title: Adani, Tata, Mahindra, Godrej double down on NCR real estate market
articles.description: The share of new NCR residential supply by developers from outside the region has quadrupled in the last four years, shows ANAROCK Research data.

articles.title: IRFC Offer for Sale oversubscribed 1.86 times, govt ups stake sale
articles.description: The Centre's Offer for Sale in IRFC was oversubscribed 1.86 times on the first day, prompting the government to exercise the green shoe option. Retail investors and employees will be able to participate in the OFS on Thursday, June 25, 2026.

articles.title: Bengaluru Lawyer Declines Legal Action Against Friend Over Rs 5 Lakh Debt: ‘Fighting For This Amount Is Not Worth It’
articles.description: A lawyer shared why she chose not to take action against a friend who still owes her Rs 5 lakh, saying the long legal process and uncertainty of recovery made her rethink the fight

articles.title: MP government to propose renaming Jabalpur Airport after Rani Durgavati
articles.description: MP CM Mohan Yadav announced the state will recommend renaming Jabalpur Airport after Rani Durgavati. A proposal will be sent to the Centre. The announcement was made on the Gond queen's death anniversary to honour her legacy and sacrifice.

articles.title: A Super Sharp Deal: T-Mobile Wants to Give You a Moto Razr Fold at an $1,100 Discount
articles.description: From now until July 7, you can pick up a shiny new Moto Razr Fold with a massive discount, no trade-in required. Available for new and current Go5G customers.

articles.title: Elevated roads and tunnel to link Vasant Kunj, Dwarka and Gurgaon
articles.description: A significant Rs 7,000-crore tunnel project, along with approach roads, is poised for Union Cabinet approval. This ambitious infrastructure will connect Nelson Mandela Marg to the Shiv Murti interchange, promising seamless travel to Terminal 3, Gurgaon, and Dwarka Expressways. The six-lane tunnel aims to bypass the congested Mahipalpur stretch, significantly reducing travel time and improving traffic flow for commuters across various parts of Delhi and beyond.

articles.title: India's FY27 growth likely to slow down to 6.6% on energy stress, sub-par monsoon: S&P
articles.description: India's economic growth is projected to slow to 6.6% in the current fiscal year, according to S&P Global Ratings. This slowdown is attributed to energy market pressures, a potentially weak monsoon, and a global economic deceleration. Higher energy and fertilizer costs are expected to fuel inflation, potentially leading to a policy rate hike in the latter half of the fiscal year.

articles.title: Swiggy Instamart COO Ankit Jain, CBO Hari Kumar quit amid top-level rejig
articles.description: Quick commerce platform Instamart has seen key leadership departures with COO Ankit Jain and CBO Hari Kumar resigning due to personal reasons. Both executives, formerly of Flipkart, played crucial roles in the quick commerce business. This comes as Swiggy, Instamart's parent company, faces intense competition in the rapidly growing quick commerce sector, with other players aggressively expanding their reach.

articles.title: Brent Crude At $75: Oil Prices Fall To Lowest Level Since US-Iran War Began
articles.description: Brent crude slipped to an intraday low of $75.44 per barrel on Wednesday, below the previous post-war low of $75.75 (recorded on March 3, 2026), while US benchmark West Texas Intermediate traded near...

articles.title: Nifty Bank surges 2% as ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank lead; key triggers here
articles.description: Banking stocks are in spotlight today as the RBI allowed domestic lenders to extend loans to non-residents against foreign currency ​deposits, including via their offshore branches.

articles.title: NIIs lead Advit Jewels IPO demand; subscription tops 32x, GMP at 40%
articles.description: The ₹165.16-crore public issue of Jaipur-based jewellery manufacturer and Rambhajo brand owner Advit Jewels, which opened for subscription on June 23, has been subscribed 32.01 times

articles.title: Gautam Adani Unveils Massive Power And Nuclear Expansion Plan At AGM
articles.description: At the Adani Group AGM, Chairman Gautam Adani highlighted the conglomerate's aggressive expansion across infrastructure and energy sectors. The group invested over ₹1.5 lakh crore in infrastructure during FY26, accounting for more than 30% of India's total new private-sector capital expenditure. Adani Power is executing a ₹2 lakh crore expansion programme aimed at reaching 45 GW of generation capacity over the next five years. The group also announced plans to jointly develop 5,000 MW of hydropower projects in Bhutan with Druk Green Power Corporation. Additionally, Adani has entered the nuclear energy sector, targeting 10 GW of capacity by 2035.

articles.title: Techie Reveals How He Tripled Salary To Rs 25 Lakh Within A Year: 'Would Never Have Believed'
articles.description: Developer shares how switching jobs boosted his salary from Rs 3.3 LPA to Rs 24.8 Lakh.

articles.title: Intense AI use still rare among euro zone firms, ECB researchers find
articles.description: FRANKFURT, June 24 : Only a small fraction of euro zone firms use artificial intelligence intensely and they tend to be small, young, service-oriented companies, leaving plenty of room for diffusion, a European Central Bank blog post said on Wednesday.The vast majority of firms now say they have been using AI

articles.title: AMFI Rejig: Mazagon Dock among 9 largecaps stocks that may get midcap status in H2 CY26
articles.description: Nuvama Institutional Equities expects AMFI’s H2 CY26 semi-annual rejig to trigger changes in market-cap classifications, with around nine stocks potentially moving from large-cap to midcap status. Rising cut-off thresholds could affect names across real estate, hospitality, healthcare, industrials and consumer sectors.
